prompt_text:
### Demographics: 68-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 20 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after hyperglycemia symptoms (polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss)
Current symptoms: Rare nocturnal hypoglycemia (1 episode in 3 months); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Hemodialysis)
Heart failure: HFmrEF (NYHA Class II)
Fibrosis
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
Major Depressive Disorder
Cholelithiasis (status post cholecystectomy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Hemodialysis); HF: HFmrEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Fibrosis; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (paternal grandfather)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 3-4 drinks/week (2-3 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Sitagliptin 100mg once daily; Sertraline (50 mg daily), Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Losartan (50 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 89.3 kg; Height 165.8 cm; BMI 32.5 kg/m²; Blood pressure 139/88 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.3%; 9 months ago 8.9%; 6 months ago 8.4%; 3 months ago 7.9%; current 6.2%), FPG (12 months ago 262mg/dL; 9 months ago 226mg/dL; 6 months ago 217mg/dL; 3 months ago 192mg/dL; current 133mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 88.9kg; 9 months ago 88.1kg; 6 months ago 90.3kg; 3 months ago 87.8kg; current 89.3kg), Height (12 months ago 165.8cm; 9 months ago 165.8cm; 6 months ago 165.8cm; 3 months ago 165.8cm; current 165.8cm), BMI (12 months ago 32.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 32.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 33.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 32.0kg/m²; current 32.5kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 139mmHg; 9 months ago 136mmHg; 6 months ago 137mmHg; 3 months ago 140mmHg; current 139mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 90mmHg; 9 months ago 87mmHg; 6 months ago 86mmHg; 3 months ago 88mmHg; current 88mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 43U/L; 9 months ago 51U/L; 6 months ago 44U/L; 3 months ago 51U/L; current 46U/L), AST (12 months ago 96U/L; 9 months ago 98U/L; 6 months ago 92U/L; 3 months ago 91U/L; current 92U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 2.0mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.9mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.9mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.9mg/dL; current 1.8mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 10mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 13mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 11mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 8.0mL/min/1.73m²; current 9mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 654mg/g; 9 months ago 458mg/g; 6 months ago 569mg/g; 3 months ago 436mg/g; current 562mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 95mg/dL; 9 months ago 93mg/dL; 6 months ago 98mg/dL; 3 months ago 98mg/dL; current 96mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 37mg/dL; 9 months ago 38mg/dL; 6 months ago 37mg/dL; 3 months ago 41mg/dL; current 39mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 159mg/dL; 9 months ago 142mg/dL; 6 months ago 146mg/dL; 3 months ago 161mg/dL; current 153mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.0g/dL; 9 months ago 13.0g/dL; 6 months ago 13.0g/dL; 3 months ago 12.2g/dL; current 12.3g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.95 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
